lens: can stored data end up wrong, duplicated, orphaned, or lost — judge whether writes stay consistent under concurrent writes and retries and whether migrations are safe
note: The labeled held-out set is one JSON object per line at held_out_path: {"input_code": <str>, "gold_band": [lo, hi]}. The harness, driver, scorer, and golden suite all read it verbatim. held_out_path matches judge/code-review/data-integrity/metric.json exactly. SWAP held_out.jsonl to plug in more labeled examples; ids are assigned by surviving-line order (DI-001, DI-002, ...).
